steps.t: Search for Rangers of Ithilien within after-battle Osgiliath.
Gladhir, Mírthel, and Arodor can be found at the main Ranger encampment in after-battle Osgiliath. You should speak with the other Rangers.
You should talk to Mablung, who can be found at the main Ranger encampment in after-battle Osgiliath.
